issues.claim: Analog not reconstructible from chapter alone
issues.objection: Removed-verse test for 7.26: if 7.26 were removed from the source pack, the chapter alone would not produce this specific engineering analog. The analog depends on the verse's specific structural claim (thread 3 (Krishna knows past/present/future; no one knows him; STRETCHED)), which is not stated equivalently elsewhere in the chapter. Tags (operator-system-coupling, team-state, system-recognition) anchor on this verse's specific claim. The STRETCHED tag is honest for this verse: Verse claims structural mystery across the threefold time. Engineering analog scoped narrowly at single-career, single-system asymmetry between substrate-vantage and surface-vantage. Counter-example: senior knowledge that resists transmission is pathology.

notes: Removed-verse test for 7.26: analog is anchored on this verse's specific structural claim, not on chapter-level material alone. PASS.
